anime_artists_mangakas.name: Osamu Tezuka
anime_artists_mangakas.note: God of Manga; cinematic paneling and serialized pacing.

anime_artists_mangakas.name: Katsuhiro Otomo
anime_artists_mangakas.note: Akira creator; dense urban futurism and kinetic destruction.

anime_artists_mangakas.name: Hayao Miyazaki
anime_artists_mangakas.note: Studio Ghibli co-founder; ecological fantasy and fluid motion language.

anime_artists_mangakas.name: Satoshi Kon
anime_artists_mangakas.note: Psychological montage and reality-fiction blurring in animation.

anime_artists_mangakas.name: Takehiko Inoue
anime_artists_mangakas.note: Slam Dunk/Vagabond; expressive brushwork and dramatic anatomy.

anime_artists_mangakas.name: Tite Kubo
anime_artists_mangakas.note: Bleach; high-contrast character silhouette and fashion cues.

graphic_design_artists.name: Paul Rand
graphic_design_artists.note: IBM/ABC/UPS logos; modern corporate identity systems.

graphic_design_artists.name: Massimo Vignelli
graphic_design_artists.note: NYC Subway map and strict modernist grids.

graphic_design_artists.name: Saul Bass
graphic_design_artists.note: Iconic film title sequences and reductive poster language.

graphic_design_artists.name: Josef Muller-Brockmann
graphic_design_artists.note: Swiss grid systems and objective typography.

graphic_design_artists.name: Milton Glaser
graphic_design_artists.note: I ❤ NY and expressive conceptual poster design.

graphic_design_artists.name: Stefan Sagmeister
graphic_design_artists.note: Concept-first graphic systems and provocative craft.

cartoon_animation_styles.name: Anime
cartoon_animation_styles.note: Stylized character acting, cinematic framing, limited-animation efficiency.

cartoon_animation_styles.name: Stop-motion
cartoon_animation_styles.note: Physical miniature capture with tactile lighting.

cartoon_animation_styles.name: Motion Graphics
cartoon_animation_styles.note: Type-shape driven narrative animation for info and brand.

art_styles_movements.name: Impressionism
art_styles_movements.note: Light-driven brushwork and modern life scenes.

art_styles_movements.name: Post-Impressionism
art_styles_movements.note: Expressive color and structure beyond optical realism.

art_styles_movements.name: Minimalism
art_styles_movements.note: Reduction to essential form and color.

design_color_psychology.name: Color-Emotion Mapping
design_color_psychology.note: Blue trust, red urgency, green growth, black authority (culture-sensitive).

design_color_psychology.name: Contrast Sensitivity
design_color_psychology.note: Perceived readability depends on luminance contrast.

design_color_psychology.name: Von Restorff Effect
design_color_psychology.note: Distinct visual items are remembered better.

design_color_psychology.name: Hick's Law
design_color_psychology.note: Decision time rises with option count.

design_color_psychology.name: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
design_color_psychology.note: Users perceive attractive designs as easier to use.

design_color_psychology.name: Peak-End Rule
design_color_psychology.note: Experience judged by peak and ending moments.

design_color_psychology.name: Goal-Gradient Effect
design_color_psychology.note: Users accelerate as they approach completion.

film_directors.name: Akira Kurosawa
film_directors.note: Dynamic blocking, weather, and movement in frame.

film_directors.name: Alfred Hitchcock
film_directors.note: Suspense grammar and subjective camera logic.

film_directors.name: Martin Scorsese
film_directors.note: Kinetic camera language and character intensity.

camera_lens_catalog.name: ARRI ALEXA 35
camera_lens_catalog.note: Super 35 digital cinema camera with high dynamic range.

camera_lens_catalog.name: RED V-RAPTOR 8K
camera_lens_catalog.note: High-resolution cinema capture and frame-rate flexibility.

camera_lens_catalog.name: Sony Venice 2
camera_lens_catalog.note: Full-frame cinema system with color science depth.

photo_styles_and_design_psychology.name: Editorial Portrait
photo_styles_and_design_psychology.note: Narrative identity through styling and lighting.

photo_styles_and_design_psychology.name: Game UX: Flow Channel
photo_styles_and_design_psychology.note: Balance challenge and skill to sustain engagement.

photo_styles_and_design_psychology.name: Anticipatory Design
photo_styles_and_design_psychology.note: Predict likely user needs from context/history.
